creator: freebsd@schukraft.org
text:
After a long delay, I finally upgraded FreeBSD 13.1 to 13.1-p1, and with that from Firefox 101 to 104 a few days ago. Since then, every now and then, individual tabs in firefox start crashing. E.g. after being redirected to paypal to pay for some pizza, the login page loads, but after about 3 seconds crashes.

A firefox.core gets created, and if someone walks me through it, I can try to extract some information from it.
